post.description: Guarded chat completion. Set `stream: true` for an SSE token stream (text/event-stream); requires the feature's output PII protection to be off.
Dry-run policy evaluation without calling LiteLLM or reserving budget.

get.description: List API keys (metadata only — never secrets). Requires keys:admin.

post.description: Issue a new API key. The plaintext secret is returned once. Requires keys:admin.
Mint a new secret for a key; the old secret stops working. Requires keys:admin.

get.description: Read the tamper-evident admin audit log. Requires audit:read.
Re-walk the audit hash chain and report whether it is intact. Requires audit:read.

post.description: Erase a user's request-linked data (GDPR/CCPA right-to-erasure). Requires data:erase.

get.description: List stored policy versions (metadata). Requires policy:read.

post.description: Validate and store a new (inactive) policy version. Requires policy:write.

get.description: Active policy version metadata. Requires policy:read.

post.description: Activate a stored version (rollback = activate a prior id). Requires policy:write.
